com.semanticwww.yesir.io.rss.rssmodel
Class RSSXMLFactory

java.lang.Object
  com.semanticwww.yesir.io.rss.rssmodel.RSSXMLFactory
public class RSSXMLFactory
extends java.lang.Object

This class initializes the parser with a InputStream from the RSSUrl

Version:
0.63b
Author:
Benjamin Pasero

Field Summary
private  boolean authInURL
          TRUE if the BASE64 auth is element of the URL
private  java.lang.String baseAuthValue
          BASE64 encoded auth value
static java.lang.String charEncoding
           
private  org.jdom.Document document

          TRUE if https is used as protocol in the URL
private  RSSXMLParser parser
           
private  java.lang.String proxyPassword
           
private  java.lang.String proxyUsername
           
private  RSSChannel rssChannel
           
private  java.lang.String rssUrl
           
private  boolean useAuth
          TRUE if BASE64 auth should be used for the favorite
private  boolean useProxy
          TRUE if a proxy should be used for the favorite
 
Constructor Summary
RSSXMLFactory(java.lang.String rssUrl)
          Create a new parser for the given URL to the RSS file
RSSXMLFactory(java.lang.String rssUrl, boolean ignoreRSS)
          Use this constructor to get a InputStream for a XML that is not a RSS / RDF XML (like user.xml)
 
Method Summary
private  void checkAuthInUrl()
          Check if the user had typed in a URL like "http://user:pass@domain.de"
private  void checkHttpsInUrl()
          Add new Security Provider to support connects to "https://"

          Get the XML Document

          Get the generated RSSChannel

          Parse RSS from the URL.

          Method to get the contents of rss xml as InputStream

          Init a new XML Parser from the RSS XML
private  void initXMLParser(org.jdom.Document document)
          Initialize the RSSOwlXMLParser with the given Document
private  org.jdom.Document openRSSFromLocal(org.jdom.input.SAXBuilder builder, org.jdom.Document document)
          Trys to open the RSS from the local path
static void setIgnoreDTD(org.jdom.input.SAXBuilder builder)
          Set builder to ignore the DTD in the XML.
static java.lang.String userNamePasswordBase64(java.lang.String userNamePassword)

Constructor Detail

RSSXMLFactory

public RSSXMLFactory(java.lang.String rssUrl)
              throws RSSXMLFactoryException
Create a new parser for the given URL to the RSS file

Parameters:
rssUrl - URL or Path to the RSS XML
Throws:
RSSOwlXMLFactoryException
RSSXMLFactoryException

RSSXMLFactory

public RSSXMLFactory(java.lang.String rssUrl,
                     boolean ignoreRSS)
              throws RSSXMLFactoryException
Use this constructor to get a InputStream for a XML that is not a RSS / RDF XML (like user.xml)

Parameters:
rssUrl - URL / Path to the XML
ignoreRSS - Param indicates that its not intended to retrieve a RSS / RDF XML InputStream
Method Detail

initXmlDocument

private void initXmlDocument()
                      throws RSSXMLFactoryException
Init a new XML Parser from the RSS XML

Throws:
RSSOwlXMLFactoryException
RSSXMLFactoryException

initXMLParser

private void initXMLParser(org.jdom.Document document)
                    throws RSSXMLFactoryException
Initialize the RSSOwlXMLParser with the given Document

Parameters:
document - The RSS / RDF Document
Throws:
RSSXMLFactoryException

getUrlInputStream

public java.io.InputStream getUrlInputStream()
                                      throws org.jdom.JDOMException,
                                             java.io.IOException,
                                             java.net.MalformedURLException
Parse RSS from the URL. This method considers https-connects, BASE Auth connects and connects via a proxy server.

Returns:
InputStream of the RSS XML
Throws:
org.jdom.JDOMException
java.io.IOException
java.net.MalformedURLException

checkAuthInUrl

private void checkAuthInUrl()
                     throws java.net.MalformedURLException
Check if the user had typed in a URL like "http://user:pass@domain.de"

Throws:
java.net.MalformedURLException

private org.jdom.Document openRSSFromLocal(org.jdom.input.SAXBuilder builder,
                                           org.jdom.Document document)
                                    throws RSSXMLFactoryException
Trys to open the RSS from the local path

Parameters:
builder -
document -
Returns:
The parsed Document
Throws:
RSSXMLFactoryException

setIgnoreDTD

public static void setIgnoreDTD(org.jdom.input.SAXBuilder builder)
Set builder to ignore the DTD in the XML. This speeds up loading / parsing of the rss xml.

Parameters:
builder -

Get the generated RSSChannel

Returns:
Generated RSSChannel from the RSS XML
